item.title: Bridal Makeup Starts With Skin And Here’s Why
item.description: I believe a stunning bridal look begins long before the foundation. I’m explaining why I focus on skin preparation to ensure your makeup stays flawless and radiant throughout your big day.

media:content.media:title: Bridal Makeup Starts With Skin And Here’s Why
media:content.media:description: I believe a stunning bridal look begins long before the foundation. I’m explaining why I focus on skin preparation to ensure your makeup stays flawless and radiant throughout your big day.

item.title: This Eyeliner Is For The Hooded Eyes!
item.description: Learn how to perfect your winged liner with this makeup tutorial designed specifically for eyeliner for hooded eyes! This easy-to-follow how to do winged eyeliner guide will give you the best beginner eyeliner tips, and help you master the winged liner look. Say goodbye to smudged eyeliner and hello to flawless makeup for hooded eyes!

media:content.media:title: This Eyeliner Is For The Hooded Eyes!
media:content.media:description: Learn how to perfect your winged liner with this makeup tutorial designed specifically for eyeliner for hooded eyes! This easy-to-follow how to do winged eyeliner guide will give you the best beginner eyeliner tips, and help you master the winged liner look. Say goodbye to smudged eyeliner and hello to flawless makeup for hooded eyes!

item.title: The NEW way I have been wearing my eyeliner!
item.description: I’ve been experimenting with a different eyeliner technique lately, and I’m obsessed with the results. Join me as I show you how I’m updating my look for a more lifted and modern finish.

media:content.media:title: The NEW way I have been wearing my eyeliner!
media:content.media:description: I’ve been experimenting with a different eyeliner technique lately, and I’m obsessed with the results. Join me as I show you how I’m updating my look for a more lifted and modern finish.

item.title: Stunning pre-wedding glam recreation
item.description: A bridal-inspired glam makeup look recreated step by step, featuring soft glow, defined eyes, and a flawless finish perfect for a pre-wedding event.

media:content.media:title: Stunning pre-wedding glam recreation
media:content.media:description: A bridal-inspired glam makeup look recreated step by step, featuring soft glow, defined eyes, and a flawless finish perfect for a pre-wedding event.

item.title: 10 Fabulous FOUNDATION Hacks YOU NeedTo Know!
item.description: I’m sharing 10 essential foundation tips to help you achieve a seamless base. From better blending to long-wear secrets, these are the techniques I use for a polished, everyday look.

media:content.media:title: 10 Fabulous FOUNDATION Hacks YOU NeedTo Know!
media:content.media:description: I’m sharing 10 essential foundation tips to help you achieve a seamless base. From better blending to long-wear secrets, these are the techniques I use for a polished, everyday look.

item.title: My Ultimate Hair Grow Tips!
item.description: I’m sharing the foundational habits I use to maintain length and strength. From scalp care to my favorite styling routines, here is how I keep my hair growing and healthy.

media:content.media:title: My Ultimate Hair Grow Tips!

item.title: Sleek buns always elevate a look!
item.description: Smooth the front, tuck the flyaways, and let the shine do the talking!

media:content.media:title: Sleek buns always elevate a look!

item.title: My FAVORITE Cut Crease Method
item.description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

media:content.media:title: My FAVORITE Cut Crease Method
media:content.media:description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

item.title: How to COVER Dark Circles & Under Eye Bags step-by-step
item.description: In this tutorial I'm teaching you how to create a smooth canvas and cover dark circles, under eye bags and smooth out fine lines with just a few simple steps. I hope you enjoy this tutorial!

media:content.media:title: How to COVER Dark Circles & Under Eye Bags step-by-step
media:content.media:description: In this tutorial I'm teaching you how to create a smooth canvas and cover dark circles, under eye bags and smooth out fine lines with just a few simple steps. I hope you enjoy this tutorial!

item.title: Eye TAPE for hooded eyes!
item.description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

media:content.media:title: Eye TAPE for hooded eyes!
media:content.media:description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

item.title: Create more lid space with one simple mapping trick
item.description: If you feel like you’ve run out of room for eyeshadow, this simple mapping trick is for you! I’m showing you how to "cheat" your crease upward to create the illusion of more lid space. This technique is a lifesaver for hooded or deep-set eyes, giving you a bigger, brighter canvas to play with.

media:content.media:title: Create more lid space with one simple mapping trick
media:content.media:description: If you feel like you’ve run out of room for eyeshadow, this simple mapping trick is for you! I’m showing you how to "cheat" your crease upward to create the illusion of more lid space. This technique is a lifesaver for hooded or deep-set eyes, giving you a bigger, brighter canvas to play with.
